payload.answer: Approve the new status as a superseding update: the Brain Slack agent moved from planned/open to implemented. If preserving history matters, retain the prior planned/open state as historical context rather than current state.
citations: Existing project state: The Brain Slack agent is planned, status=open.
New: The Brain Slack agent MVP is now implemented.

entity_resolution.reason: The existing project appears to be the same entity as the new update, but no durable identifier was provided, so entity linkage remains provisional.

details: Recognized a status transition from planned/open to implemented.

Avoided presenting the older planned/open state as current.
